spec.name: A Raised Dais
spec.description: You are at the southern end of the ancient hall, the dust and darkness absorbing your light so that you cannot see past the steps of the dais. A low pedestal rests here. You see something written into the face of it.

north.description: You cannot see past the steps of the dais.

down.description: You see a seam in the stone floor.

extra_descs.description: The writings are covered in sand and worn nearly away by the passage of time: 'I am Ramses the Damned, once counselor and aide to the mightiest of pharoahs and queens of this land. Much time has passed since I last walked the earth. Disturb my rest at your peril.'
